Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Lambda abstraction for partial setoids

 In this file, we define lambda abstraction for partial setoids, which is yet another piece
 necessary to construct exponentials in the category of partial setoids.

 Fix partial setoids `X`, `Y`, and `Z`, and let `φ` be a morphism from `X ×h Z` to `Y`. The
 lambda abstraction of `φ` is a morphism from `Z` to the exponential from `X` to `Y`. Recall
 that the exponential was defined using the powerset operation, and in essence, the function
 space from `X` to `Y` is defined as the collection of all  functional relations between  `X`
 and `Y`. The underlying formula of the lambda abstraction operator is thus given by a relation
 between `Z` and the exponential from `X` to `Y`. Let's say we have some term `z` of type `X`
 and a term `f` of the exponential, then these are related if both `z` and `f` are defined
 (i.e., `z ~ z` and `f ~ f`), and if for all `x` and `y` we have that `φ` sends the pair
 `⟨ x , z ⟩` to `y` if and only if `f` sends `x` to `y`. The requirements are written down
 formally in [lam_partial_setoid_is_def] and [lam_partial_setoid_eq].

 We are required to check that this is a partial setoid morphism, and thus we must show
 that every `z` such that `z ~ z` has an image, and thus we must verify that every `z` gets
 mapped to an actual function by lambda abstraction.  One of the required checks is that
 images exist and for that we use [lam_image_form].

 Content
 1. The formula defining abstraction
 2. Accessors
 3. The image
 4. Lambda abstraction

 ******************************************************************************************)

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.Tripos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.GenericPredicate.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERs.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.PERBinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Hyperdoctrines.PartialEqRels.ExponentialPER.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope hd.

Section PERLambda.
  Context {H : tripos}
          {X Y Z : partial_setoid H}
          (φ : partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z) Y).

  (** * 1. The formula defining abstraction *)
  Definition lam_partial_setoid_is_def
    : form (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
    := let z := π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) in
       let f := π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) in
       z ~ z
       ∧
       exp_partial_setoid_is_function [ f ].

  Definition lam_partial_setoid_eq
    : form (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
    := let z := π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))) in
       let f := π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))) in
       let x := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))) in
       let y := π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) in
       (∀h ∀h (φ [ ⟨ ⟨ x , z ⟩ , y ⟩ ] ⇔ ⟨ x , y ⟩ ∈ f)).

  Definition lam_partial_setoid_form
    : form (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
    := lam_partial_setoid_is_def
       ∧
       lam_partial_setoid_eq.

  (** * 2. Accessors *)
  Section Accessors.
    Context {Γ : ty H}
            {Δ : form Γ}
            (z : tm Γ Z)
            (f : tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y))
            (p : Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z , f ⟩]).

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ z ~ z

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ z ~ z

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
(lam_partial_setoid_is_def ∧ lam_partial_setoid_eq)
[⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ z ~ z

    Qed.

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y

p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
(∀h (∀h (φ
         [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
            π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
            ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ⟩]
         ⇔ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
           ⟩
           ∈ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))))
[⟨ z, f ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
∀h (∀h (φ
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
           ⟩,
         π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩,
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var
                      (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
           ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
(∀h (φ
     [⟨ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
      ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
     ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
       [⟨ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ⟩,
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
[⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
∀h (φ
    [(⟨ ⟨ π₂
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
        π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
      ⟩
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
     [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [(⟨ ⟨ π₂
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
          ⟩,
        π₂
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
        ⟩
        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
(φ
 [(⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
  [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [(⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
(φ
 [(⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
  [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
 ⇔ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
   [(⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
     ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z, f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
    [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    Qed.

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

  Y
Γ: ty H

p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

      exact q.
    Qed.

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
p: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
q: Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f
Δ ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

      exact q.
    Qed.
  End Accessors.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)) ~
    π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y))
    ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
      [π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y))])
   ∧ lam_partial_setoid_eq) [⟨ z, f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
    ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
      [π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))])
   ∧ lam_partial_setoid_eq) [⟨ z, f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ((π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ~
    π₁ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) [⟨ z, f ⟩]
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function
     [(π₂ (tm_var (Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) [⟨ z, f ⟩ ]tm])
  ∧ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ
⊢ (z ~ z ∧ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f])
  ∧ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ z ~ z
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ z ~ z
 exact p₁.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
 exact p₂.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z: tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p₁: Δ ⊢ z ~ z
p₂: Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
p₃: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z, f ⟩]
 exact p₃.
  Qed.

  (** The formula is preserved under the partial setoid relation of the first argument *)
  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z', f ⟩]

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z', f ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y

Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ z' ~ z'
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z', f ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ z' ~ z'
 exact (partial_setoid_refl_r p).
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [f]
 exact (lam_partial_setoid_form_is_function _ _ r).
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq [⟨ z', f ⟩]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (φ
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))) ⟩,
            π₂
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y))))))) [⟨ z', f ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((φ
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))) ⟩,
            π₂
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z', f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
      ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ⇔ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     ∈ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z', f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
      ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ⇔ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     ∈ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ z', f ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
     z' [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
     z' [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
Δ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))]
⊢ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
     z' [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm ⟩,

  ⇔ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ f [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z' [γ ]tm ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ] ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z' [γ ]tm ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z' [γ ]tm ⟩, y ⟩]

⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

H: tripos

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f

γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ

y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Z
 exact (z [ γ ]tm).

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]) [γ]
⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

  Y
Γ: ty H

p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z' [γ ]tm ⟩, y ⟩]

Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y

lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ π₁ ⟨ x, z [γ ]tm ⟩ ~ π₁ ⟨ x, z' [γ ]tm ⟩
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x

             exact lem₁.
          
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ π₂ ⟨ x, z [γ ]tm ⟩ ~ π₂ ⟨ x, z' [γ ]tm ⟩

  Y

r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ z [γ ]tm ~ z' [γ ]tm

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z

p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ⊢ z [γ ]tm ~ z' [γ ]tm

             
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H

p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ⊢ (z ~ z') [γ]

  Y

p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

Δ ⊢ z ~ z'

             exact p.

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z

Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z [γ ]tm ⟩, y ⟩]

p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'

tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ

lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y

⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, ?f ⟩]
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ ?f

          
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
 exact (f [ γ ]tm).

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z

Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y

⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y

p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]

Δ [γ]
⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

             
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
(lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]) [γ]
⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

             
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]
⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z [γ ]tm, f [γ ]tm ⟩]

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
          
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
z, z': tm Γ Z
f: tm Γ (exp_partial_setoid X Y)
Δ: form Γ
p: Δ ⊢ z ~ z'
q: Δ ⊢ f ~ f
r: Δ ⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form [⟨ z, f ⟩]
γ:= π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Γ
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) Y
lem₁: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ x ~ x
lem₂: Δ [γ] ∧ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm ⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f [γ ]tm

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  (** * 3. The image *)
  Definition lam_image_form
    : form ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)
    := let x := π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) in
       let y := π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) in
       let z := π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) in
       φ [ ⟨ ⟨ x , z ⟩ , y ⟩ ].

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z) (X ×h Y)
γ:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z) (𝟙 ×h Z)
lam_image_form = (x ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [γ ]tm)

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z) (X ×h Y)
γ:= π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)): tm ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z) (𝟙 ×h Z)
lam_image_form = (x ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [γ ]tm)

    exact (mor_to_tripos_power_eq _ _ lam_image_form).
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm) =
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm) =
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] =
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] = ?b
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
?b = (⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] = ?b

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] =
lam_image_form [⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩, ⟨ !!, z ⟩ ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] =
(φ
 [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) ⟩,
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) ⟩])
[⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩, ⟨ !!, z ⟩ ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] =
(φ
 [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))),
    π₂ (π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) ⟩,
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))) ⟩])
[⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩, ⟨ !!, z ⟩ ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] = φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

      apply idpath.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))
 ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
   [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)) ]tm)
[⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩, ⟨ !!, z ⟩ ⟩] =
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
(π₁ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z))
 ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
   [π₂ (tm_var ((X ×h Y) ×h 𝟙 ×h Z)) ]tm)
[⟨ ⟨ x, y ⟩, ⟨ !!, z ⟩ ⟩] =
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm)

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Γ: ty H
x: tm Γ X
y: tm Γ Y
z: tm Γ Z
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm) =
(⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [{{lam_image_form}}]

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ exp_partial_setoid_is_function [{{lam_image_form}}]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law X Y
   ∧ exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law X Y
     ∧ exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law X Y
       ∧ exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law X Y
         ∧ exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]
  ∧ (exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law X Y)
    [{{lam_image_form}}]
    ∧ (exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law X Y)
      [{{lam_image_form}}]
      ∧ (exp_partial_setoid_unique_im_law X Y)
        [{{lam_image_form}}]
        ∧ (exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law X Y)
          [{{lam_image_form}}]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

  [{{lam_image_form}}]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_dom_defined_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))))
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
           π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
            [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
    [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(tripos_in (X ×h Y))
[⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(tripos_in (X ×h Y))
[⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
 π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
      ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, y ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm ⊢ x ~ x

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, y ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩ ]tm
⊢ x ~ x

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, y ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))), z ⟩
  ]tm ⊢ x ~ x

  Y

p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X

z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_cod_defined_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
           ∈ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
           ⇒ π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
           π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇒ (π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
            [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))

[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}

⊢ (π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

(tripos_in (X ×h Y))
[⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))),

  [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, y ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))), z ⟩
  ]tm ⊢ y ~ y

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!

  Y

  Y

π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!

        apply hyperdoctrine_unit_eta.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))

⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

      apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_eq_defined_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                   ⇒ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                            ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⇒ ⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (((... ×h X)
                                         ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
                       ∈ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((...) ×h X)
                                         ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                       ⇒ ⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((... ×h X)
                                         ×h X) ×h Y)
                                       ×h Y)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                         ∈ π₁
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((((...) ×h X)
                                           ×h Y) ×h Y))))))))))
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h ((π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                              ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                             ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩]
                  ⇒ (π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                            ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                           ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))
                         ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                             ×h Y)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                            ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                    ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
                      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         (((... ×h X)
                                           ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((ℙ (...) ×h X)
                                    ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ⟩,
                       π₁
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((...) ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                       ⟩
                       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                                ]tm,
                              π₂
                                (tm_var
                                   ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                     ×h X)) ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))
                            ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                    ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ⟩
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                   ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                          ]tm,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var
                             (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
                      ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
                        [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((((... ×h X)
                                           ×h X) ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)))),
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                   ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ⟩,
                         π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((...) ×h X)
                                         ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                         ⟩
                         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                                  [π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                                  ]tm,
                                π₂
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                                ⟩
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                       ×h X)) ]tm,
                              π₂
                                (tm_var
                                   (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                    ×h X)) ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                      ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                   ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)
                                     ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ (π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
  ⇒ (π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂
       (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩]
    ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [⟨ ⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         ((((ℙ (...) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h Y))))),
         π₂
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         ⟩,
       π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h Y))))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
          [π₁
             (tm_var
                (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
          ]tm,
        π₂
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
        ⟩ ]tm]
      ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
        [⟨ ⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X)
                          ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
           π₂
             (tm_var
                ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
           ⟩,
         π₁
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                        ×h Y))))) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))
                ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
              [π₁
                 (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩
            [π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ]tm,
          π₂
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         ]tm]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(((((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
    [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X))])
   [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))])
  [π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
  ∧ (π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   ((((ℙ ... ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (tm_var
                ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩])
 ∧ (π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                      ×h Y))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (tm_var
             ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁
         (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
      ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
   ]tm]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                   ×h Y)))),
     π₂
       (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁

              (tm_var
                 ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩

  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
((Δ

   [(π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)))

  ∧ (π₂
       (π₁

     π₂

             (tm_var

    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,

           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩

         ]tm,

       [π₁
          (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
       ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
     ⟩])
 ∧ (π₂
      (π₁
         (tm_var
            ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
    π₂ (tm_var ((((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,

      ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
((Δ
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))]
  ∧ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
    π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
 ∧ π₂
     (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
∧ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
    ]tm
⊢ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
    ]tm

  Y

Γ:= ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y: ty H

y₂:= π₂ (tm_var Γ): tm Γ Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var Γ))))): tm Γ Z
((Δ
  [π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))]

   π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
∧ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var
                  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
  π₂
    (π₁ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  ⟩

    [π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var
                   (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))

         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩

∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z ⟩, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₂, z ⟩, y₂ ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
  (prod_partial_setoid X Z)

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁

                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)
  (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
 exact ⟨ x₁ , z ⟩.

  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂:= π₂ (tm_var (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x₁ ~ x₂ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

  Y

  (π₁
     (π₁

                  ×h Y)))))): tm (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z

∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x₁, z ⟩, y₁ ⟩] ⊢ π₂ ⟨ x₁, z ⟩ ~ π₂ ⟨ x₂, z ⟩
