H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h (⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ⟩
               ∈ π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y))))
               ⇒ ⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var
                      (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩
                 ∈ π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))))
                 ⇒ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y))) ~
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))))
  [{{lam_image_form}}]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
              [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h Y))) ⟩,
               π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)))) ⟩
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm]
              ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
                [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ⟩,
                 π₁
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y)))) ⟩
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                        ]tm,
                      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ⟩
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm]
                ⇒ (π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y))) ~
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ⟩])))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
((Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
     ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
    [⟨ ⟨ π₂
           (π₁
              (π₁
                 (tm_var
                    (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
     π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
     ⟩
     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
    ⇒ (π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
             [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
           [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))

     ⟩,

      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]

  [⟨ ⟨ π₂

            (π₁

     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁

   ⟩

      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(tripos_in (X ×h Y))
[⟨ ⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

  ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
         [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(tripos_in (X ×h Y))
[⟨ ⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(tripos_in (X ×h Y))
[⟨ ⟨ π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
 π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
 ⟩
 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩

  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
∧ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   π₁
     (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
   ⟩
   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
          [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
        [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
⊢ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  ]tm
∧ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

  Y

p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  ]tm
∧ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
⟨ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  ]tm
∧ ⟨ π₂
      (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ]tm
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  ]tm
∧ ⟨ x, y' ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁
       (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
    ]tm ⊢ y ~ y'

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩
∈ {{lam_image_form}}
  [⟨ π₁
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
   ⟩ ]tm
∧ ⟨ x, y' ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [⟨ π₁
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
     π₂
       (π₁
          (π₁
             (π₁
                (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
     ⟩ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y'

  Y

z:= π₂

       (π₁

            (π₁
               (π₁
                  (tm_var
                     ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))),
     z ⟩ ]tm ⊢ y ~ y'

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

y':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm
∧ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm
⊢ y ~ y'

z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁

x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm
∧ ⟨ x, y' ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm

  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

y':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y' ⟩] ⊢ y ~ y'

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)

z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Z
x:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y' ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ?x, y ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (exp_partial_setoid_im_exists_law X Y)
  [{{lam_image_form}}]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ (∀h (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X))
       ⇒ ∃h (⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
             ∈ (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
               ]tm))) [{{lam_image_form}}]

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
       π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
      [⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
      ⇒ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
             (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
             ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
  [⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
     ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
  ⇒ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
        [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
         (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
              [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
            [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
∧ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)) ~
   π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
  [⟨ {{lam_image_form}} [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
     ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((tripos_in (X ×h Y))
      [⟨ ⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
       (π₁ (tm_var (ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X)))
       [π₁ (tm_var ((ℙ (X ×h Y) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ {{lam_image_form}}
            [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
          [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
        π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))] ∧ x ~ x
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))] ∧ x ~ x ⊢ ?Goal
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))] ∧ x ~ x) ∧ ?Goal
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))] ∧ x ~ x ⊢ ?Goal

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z

        exact (hyperdoctrine_proof_subst (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) p).
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))] ∧ x ~ x)
∧ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
∧ x ~ x
  ∧ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
    [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
x ~ x
∧ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
  [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))]
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
x ~ x
∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)))
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
x ~ x ∧ z ~ z
⊢ ∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
      ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
        [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
x ~ x ∧ z ~ z ⊢ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ ⟨ x, z ⟩
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
x ~ x ∧ z ~ z ⊢ π₂ ⟨ x, z ⟩ ~ π₂ ⟨ x, z ⟩
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
x ~ x ∧ z ~ z ⊢ z ~ z

          
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
z ~ z ⊢ z ~ z

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) X
z:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))): tm ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (∃h (⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm))
  [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ∃h ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
       π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
       ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
         [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
      [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y), ?t ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y

          exact y.
        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
      [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
 π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ((⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
    π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
    ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
      [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm)
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
((π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ~
  π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)))
 [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
 ∧ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))))
   [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))])
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)),
     π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ (tripos_in (X ×h Y))
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩,
   {{lam_image_form}}
   [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm ⟩
   [⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
      [π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
    π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
    [⟨ tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y), y ⟩ ]tm ]tm]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ~
 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))
 ∧ π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ~
   π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
∧ φ
  [⟨ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))), y ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))) ]tm

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
     π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩
    ]tm

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩
  ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
    [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))), z
     ⟩ ]tm

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!

          apply hyperdoctrine_unit_eta.
        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
(x ~ x ∧ z ~ z) ∧ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
p: Δ ⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

        apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
Δ
⊢ lam_partial_setoid_eq
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)), {{lam_image_form}} ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
Δ
⊢ (∀h (∀h (φ
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))) ⟩,
            π₂
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))))
  [⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)), {{lam_image_form}} ⟩]

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
Δ
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((φ
           [⟨ ⟨ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
              π₁
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                          ×h Y)))) ⟩,
            π₂
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
            ⟩]
           ⇔ ⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))
             ⟩
             ∈ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
                           ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)),
               {{lam_image_form}} ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
(Δ [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X))])
[π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))]
⊢ (φ
   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
      π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))
      ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ⇔ ⟨ π₂
         (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),
     π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
     ∈ π₂
         (π₁
            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)), {{lam_image_form}} ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

   [⟨ ⟨ π₂
          (π₁ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))),

      ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]
   ⇔ ⟨ π₂

            (π₁
               (tm_var (((Z ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))
  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)), {{lam_image_form}} ⟩
       [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X)) ⟩
     [π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
   π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]

[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))),

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
Δ
[⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))), z ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩
    ∈ {{lam_image_form}}
      [⟨ π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))),
       z ⟩ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
Δ [⟨ !!, z ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
π₁ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))) = !!

      apply hyperdoctrine_unit_eta.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
Δ [⟨ !!, z ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]
  ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ {{lam_image_form}} [⟨ !!, z ⟩ ]tm

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
Δ: form (𝟙 ×h Z)
x:= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Y
z:= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h X) ×h Y) Z
Δ [⟨ !!, z ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩]

    apply iff_refl.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. Lambda abstraction *)
  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws lam_partial_setoid_form

  Y

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (lam_partial_setoid_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (lam_partial_setoid_form
          [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
           π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ~
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))]
⊢ ∀h (lam_partial_setoid_form
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
      ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ~
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
⊢ lam_partial_setoid_form
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
  ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ~
    π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
(⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))])
[π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))]
∧ lam_partial_setoid_form
  [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
   π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]
⊢ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))) ~
  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))))

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_mor_eq_defined_law
  lam_partial_setoid_form
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h Z)
                                  ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                                 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h Z)
                               ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                              ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁

                    ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))): tm

                       ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))))): tm

             apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.

          apply hyperdoctrine_hyp.
        
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
x:= π₂
  (π₁
     (tm_var
        (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
          ×h X) ×h Y))): tm
  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Y) X
y:= π₂
  (tm_var
     (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
       ×h X) ×h Y)): tm
  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Y) Y
f:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (tm_var
           (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
              ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))): tm
  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
g:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))): tm
  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Y) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
z:= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (π₁
              (tm_var
                 (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                    ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))))): tm
  (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X)
   ×h Y) Z
lam_partial_setoid_form
[⟨ z,
 π₂
   (π₁
      (π₁
         (π₁
            (tm_var
               (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                  ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y))))) ⟩]
∧ lam_partial_setoid_form
  [⟨ z,
   π₂
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var
              (((((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))
                 ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)) ×h X) ×h Y)))) ⟩]
⊢ φ [⟨ ⟨ x, z ⟩, y ⟩] ⇔ ⟨ x, y ⟩ ∈ f

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law
  lam_partial_setoid_form
 
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
      ⇒ ∃h (lam_partial_setoid_form
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))
               ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩]))

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))]
⊢ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
  ⇒ ∃h (lam_partial_setoid_form
        [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
           [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
⊤ [π₁ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))]
∧ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
⊢ ∃h (lam_partial_setoid_form
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
⊢ ∃h (lam_partial_setoid_form
      [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)))
         [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
⊢ ∃h (lam_partial_setoid_form
      [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
       π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])

      
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
tm (𝟙 ×h Z) (ℙ (X ×h Y))
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z))
⊢ (lam_partial_setoid_form
   [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y)))),
    π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h Z) ×h ℙ (X ×h Y))) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z), ?t ⟩]

  [⟨ tm_var (𝟙 ×h Z), {{lam_image_form}} ⟩]

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H

  Y

 apply lam_partial_setoid_eq_image_form.
  Qed.

  
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_morphism Z (exp_partial_setoid X Y)

X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y

H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
form (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws ?φ

    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
form (Z ×h exp_partial_setoid X Y)
 exact lam_partial_setoid_form.
    
H: tripos
X, Y, Z: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism (prod_partial_setoid X Z)
  Y
partial_setoid_morphism_laws lam_partial_setoid_form
 exact lam_partial_setoid_laws.
  Defined.
End PERLambda.
